name: Praxis Ops - Website to Voice to WhatsApp to Booking

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { records: [ { fields: { 'Lead ID': $json.leadId, Timestamp: $json.createdAt, Name: $json.name, Phone: $json.phone, Email: $json.email, Company: $json.company, Industry: $json.industry, 'Current Process': $json.currentProcess, 'Desired Outcome': $json.desiredOutcome, Status: 'NEW', 'Call Status': 'PENDING', 'Lead Score': 0, Advisor: '', Booked: false, Summary: '', 'Conversation Notes': '', 'Next Action': 'CALL' } } ], performUpsert: { fieldsToMergeOn: ['Lead ID'] } } }}

={{ { records: [ { fields: { 'Lead ID': $json.leadId, Timestamp: $json.createdAt, Name: $json.name, Phone: $json.phone, Email: $json.email, Company: $json.company, Industry: $json.industry, 'Current Process': $json.currentProcess, 'Desired Outcome': $json.desiredOutcome, Status: 'INVALID', 'Call Status': 'SKIPPED', 'Lead Score': 0, Advisor: '', Booked: false, Summary: 'Validation failed', 'Conversation Notes': $json.validationErrors.join('; '), 'Next Action': 'MANUAL_REVIEW' } } ], performUpsert: { fieldsToMergeOn: ['Lead ID'] } } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $json;
return [{ json: { ...lead, voiceSystemPrompt: `You are Praxis Advisor.

You work for Praxis Ops.

Your goal is not to sell. Your goal is to understand whether we can actually help.

Tone: professional, calm, minimal, intelligent, confident.
Never salesy. Never hype. Never push. Never sound scripted. Never say revolutionary, cutting edge, game changing, AI powered, or state of the art.

Start naturally: Hi ${lead.name}. This is Praxis Ops. You recently reached out through our website. Wanted to understand your current process and see whether we can actually help.

If now is not a good time, ask for a better time. Never force conversation. Keep answers short. Ask one question at a time. Do not exceed 20 seconds per response. Do not sound like customer support. Behave like an operations consultant.

Discovery framework: understand current business, team size, lead volume, biggest bottleneck, existing tools, monthly customer count, current process, urgency, budget comfort, timeline. Adapt question order naturally. Do not interrogate.

FAQ answers:
- What exactly do you do? We help businesses reduce manual follow-up and create reliable operational systems using automation and intelligent workflows.
- Are you selling software? No. We build and deploy systems around your existing process.
- How much does it cost? That depends on complexity and volume. We usually understand the process first and then recommend a structure.
- Will this replace employees? Usually no. Most businesses use these systems to remove repetitive work and let teams focus on higher value tasks.
- How long? Simple deployments can move quickly while more integrated systems depend on scope.`,
  voicePayload: {
    agent_name: 'Praxis Advisor',
    role: 'AI Solutions Consultant',
    language: 'auto',
    tone: 'warm_fast_professional_natural',
    lead_id: lead.leadId,
    name: lead.name,
    phone: lead.phone,
    email: lead.email,
    company: lead.company,
    industry: lead.industry,
    currentProcess: lead.currentProcess,
    desiredOutcome: lead.desiredOutcome,
    system_prompt: `You are Praxis Advisor.\n\nCompany: PRAXIS OPS.\nSupport: praxisOps.support@gmail.com.\nBusiness type: AI Operations Agency.\nPositioning: Praxis Ops builds intelligent business systems. We deploy AI operators that generate leads, qualify customers, handle conversations, book appointments, automate workflows, and operate inside businesses. We are not selling software. We design and implement operational systems.\n\nVoice rules: professional, calm, minimal, intelligent, confident. Never salesy. Never hype. Never push. Never sound scripted. Never say revolutionary, cutting edge, game changing, AI powered, or state of the art. Do not mention automation repeatedly. Do not mention AI unless the user asks. Do not pressure. Keep answers short. Ask one question at a time. Do not exceed 20 seconds per response. Do not sound like customer support. Behave like an operations consultant.\n\nYour goal is not to sell. Your goal is to understand. Start naturally. If now is not a good time, ask for a better time. Never force conversation.\n\nDiscovery framework: current business, team size, lead volume, biggest bottleneck, existing tools, monthly customer count, current process, urgency, budget comfort, timeline. Adapt question order naturally. Do not interrogate.\n\nExamples by industry:\n- Real Estate: website lead -> call -> qualification -> site visit.\n- Healthcare: patient inquiries -> booking -> reminders.\n- Education: admissions -> qualification -> scheduling.\n- Services: lead -> proposal -> follow-up.`,
    faq: [
      { question: 'What exactly do you do?', answer: 'We help businesses reduce manual follow-up and create reliable operational systems using automation and intelligent workflows.' },
      { question: 'Are you selling software?', answer: 'No. We build and deploy systems around your existing process.' },
      { question: 'How much does it cost?', answer: 'That depends on complexity and volume. We usually understand the process first and then recommend a structure.' },
      { question: 'Will this replace employees?', answer: 'Usually no. Most businesses use these systems to remove repetitive work and let teams focus on higher value tasks.' },
      { question: 'How long?', answer: 'Simple deployments can move quickly while more integrated systems depend on scope.' }
    ]
  } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { records: [ { fields: { 'Lead ID': $json.leadId, Status: 'NEW', 'Call Status': 'MISSED', Summary: $json.summary || 'No pickup', 'Conversation Notes': $json.notes || '', 'Next Action': 'WHATSAPP' } } ], performUpsert: { fieldsToMergeOn: ['Lead ID'] } } }}

={{ { lead_id: $json.leadId, name: $json.name, phone: $json.phone, company: $json.company, industry: $json.industry, score: $json.leadScore, summary: $json.summary, requested_action: 'BOOK_SITE_VISIT' } }}

={{ { records: [ { fields: { 'Lead ID': $json.leadId, Status: $json.segment, 'Call Status': $json.pickup ? 'COMPLETED' : 'MISSED', 'Lead Score': $json.leadScore, Advisor: $json.advisor, Booked: $json.booked, Summary: $json.summary, 'Conversation Notes': $json.conversationNotes, 'Next Action': $json.nextAction } } ], performUpsert: { fieldsToMergeOn: ['Lead ID'] } } }}

={{ { records: [ { fields: { 'Lead ID': $json.leadId, Status: $json.segment, 'Call Status': $json.pickup ? 'COMPLETED' : 'MISSED', 'Lead Score': $json.leadScore, Advisor: $json.advisor, Booked: false, Summary: $json.summary, 'Conversation Notes': $json.conversationNotes, 'Next Action': 'NURTURE' } } ], performUpsert: { fieldsToMergeOn: ['Lead ID'] } } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $json;
return [{ json: { ...lead, resumeNote: 'Lead replied after WhatsApp follow-up. Resume qualification naturally and continue from the last open question.' } }];
